Fear and Greed has ticked up to
27
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$63K
this morning. Bitcoin edged lower overnight, giving back some of
yesterday's gains as selling pressure returned near the $62,500
resistance level that has capped every recovery attempt this
week.

The price is grinding. But regulatory and brand developments are
moving fast. The US just closed the door on a digital dollar.
India's central bank is pushing to shut crypto out of its
financial system entirely. And XRP is about to appear somewhere
no cryptocurrency has ever been before.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The US Just Ruled Out a Digital Dollar Permanently

CFTC Chairman Mike Selig declared on July 8 that the United
States will never launch a central bank digital currency, citing
a Trump executive order and an official working group policy
report.

He framed the CBDC as a surveillance risk to ordinary Americans.
The position puts the US directly at odds with dozens of
countries actively piloting their own digital currencies.

What specific risk did Selig cite as his core concern about a
CBDC?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/ItfXCHozSN67rugR5LmUUQ~~/AAQRxRA~/rUG8JrrqompCli3GogWzz9GAXiz7jP-d8RAXClTNxGa_t87uw1aD5zoZFoTsagIBu9i2DQN_NmHvS1MAU-4bTfxH9syCvwyOCNRxAMwLCbyzeL2GS2eS5Gt1lDU1OK0qUx4dLk2dVmiAMvFOaaoTCB1FRFBPVcPbC46pUJ2HeJ80eIW50kVPq5RnpOy6K1gK4bvnTEDM-hvr1hwWS7Dv3g~~ )

75684.subject: 👑 Grok is dethroning Opus and GPT
75684.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Musk dropped Grok 4.5, Opus-class coding at a fraction of the price, free for now. ChatGPT's new voice talks like a person instead of a walkie-talkie. Google Omni will restyle your videos for a fee, and Anthropic is about to post AI's first real profit, right as Musk aims at it.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Grok:** Can a $2 model really do Opus-level work?

* **ChatGPT:** What makes the new voice feel human?

* **Google:** What's the new button in Google Photos?

* **Anthropic:** Who's actually making money in AI?


----------



----------
## [Grok 4.5 launches at a quarter of Claude's price](https://x.ai/news/grok-4-5)





View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f5918d40-ff98-42a3-a912-cef6097d0c13/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_9.png?t=1783588942)
Caption: 





Must bought Cursor and dropped Grok 4.5, and the benchmarks are making OpenAI and Anthropic shake in their boots.

It’s already and Opus level model but costs way less.

$2 in, $6 out per million tokens. Opus 4.8 charges $5 and $25.

It's the first Grok built for coding and agents, trained with Cursor on trillions of tokens of real developer sessions. 

Must doesn’t want to overhype it tho. He admitted on X that it’s not close to Fable yet, but said you don’t need a Fable level model for most tasks.

Grok's pitch is the bill. It runs at 80 tokens a second and finishes the same task on a quarter of the tokens Opus burns.

Musk calls it "roughly comparable to Opus 4.7, but much faster," and says the follow-up model, reportedly 2 trillion parameters, lands next month. If this one is already at an Opus level, what happens with the next one? We’re excited. 

The new Grok is free for now in Cursor and Grok Build. The EU waits till mid-July.


----------















----------
## [The AI Boom has a bottleneck but the solution is right in front of you](https://utm.genai.works/r/okzhvfg)





View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/09618ac1-6b88-429a-8a0a-12cb201707e2/Screenshot_2026-07-09_at_10.51.16_AM.png?t=1783589006)
Caption: 





Every AI company fights the same battle. The market never sees most of them.

For years, we built the system behind the scenes and successfully ran go-to-market for NVIDIA, Oracle, Google and 300+ AI brands, powered by data from a 14M+ community competitors can't reach. 

This helped us 2.5x our revenue last year, and now you
